race.comment: SMART LEGEND (3) went fast early and went on to score by 0.6 lengths last time out over 1400m at Townsville. Drawn to stalk the leaders. Best figures measure up and is sure to run well. JOURNALISM (4) is in great form, lifting strongly to score last start over 1560m at this track to make it two in succession. Great chance to extend the sequence. COLLEANO (8) got the prize two runs ago at Warwick. Safely held last time out when second over 1830m at Home Hill, beaten 3.5 lengths after being prominent at the turn. Meets some better types this time but he has the ability to bounce back. LOGAN STREET LION (2) missed the placings two runs back then didn't do any better last start when 4.5 lengths away in eighth over 1825m at Eagle Farm. Finds a nice race and can make amends.
